title: Automatic Contact Creation from CC'd contacts

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Has anyone created an automation or solution for automatically creating contacts in the contacts board whenever and email is sent to a new contact that’s CC’d on an email. I know monday CRM does this for the recipient email but it does not add a new contact for the CC’d person.

Thanks,

Charlie
